turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there, thanks for taking my call. I'm not feeling great and I don't really know what to do.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm here to help.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I appreciate that. I guess

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Can you tell me a bit more?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, it's hard to pin down, but I’ve been feeling off—kind of tired, sometimes dizzy, and just not myself. I’m not sure if I should come in or if this could be something minor.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yeah, no problem

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for sharing how you're feeling.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, we

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to create a demo patient profile so I can help you further?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: My name is Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I just need your first and last name.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I think scheduling a visit would be good, just to check things out.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to schedule a visit to discuss your symptoms or do you have other questions?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It sounds like a general office visit would be a good fit to check on your symptoms.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Does that sound right to you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yeah, that sounds right. Do you have any appointments available soon?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I don’t have

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m fine with the first available. Whenever you can fit me in.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: or would you like to see the first available?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: the soonest available appointment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: is tomorrow, Thursday, June 25th.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: at 3 p.m. with the big new Lukoski MD.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book that time?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yeah, that works for me. Let’s go ahead and book that appointment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for Thursday, June 25th.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Thank you, I appreciate it.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: 3 p.m.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No, that’s all I needed. Thanks so much for your help. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: you're all set for your visit.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Take care.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Goodbye, take care.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Namaste.
